text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 
165 
ORGANIZATION_TYPE 
LABEL: 
Organization Type 
DESCRIPTION: This variable is the type of organization sponsoring the plan. 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
2 
SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS files) 
VALUES: 
01 = Local coordinated care plan (CCP) 
02 = Medical Savings Account (MSA) 
04 = Private fee-for-service (PFFS) plan 
05 = Demonstration 
06 = Section 1876 cost plan 
08 = Program of
